title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Pixel Diffusion (PiD) by Nvidia is an open-source AI image generation model optimized for high-resolution 4K image synthesis. The model integrates with ComfyUI workflows and uses Gemma 2b as a text encoder, supporting both text-to-image and image-to-image tasks with upscaling capabilities.
